channel.title: INtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How to Hide Google’s AI Overviews From Your Search Results
item.description: You can avoid Google’s AI summaries in your search results by simply adjusting your query. Or just switch search engines altogether.

item.title: How to View the ‘Blood Moon’ Total Lunar Eclipse on March 3
item.description: Next month, the Earth will come between the sun and the moon, causing the moon to take on an eerie reddish hue.

item.title: Best Electric Toothbrush, Backed by Real-Life Testing (2026)
item.description: How to choose a toothbrush that protects your smile and gum health.

item.title: Move over, Apple: Meet the alternative app stores available in the EU and elsewhere
item.description: A list of some of the alternative app stores iPhone users in the EU can try today.

item.title: Creatine Supplements Are Everywhere. Do I Need Them? (2026)
item.description: It’s the most studied supplement in sports medicine, but it’s not just for athletes anymore.

item.title: The 9,000-pound monster I don’t want to give back
item.description: I thought: other than hotels that use SUVs like the Escalade IQL to ferry guests around, what kind of monster chooses a car like this?

item.title: Sam Altman would like remind you that humans use a lot of energy, too
item.description: "It also takes a lot of energy to train a human."

item.title: Microsoft’s new gaming CEO vows not to flood the ecosystem with ‘endless AI slop’
item.description: Is Microsoft's gaming division doubling down on AI?

item.title: Wikipedia blacklists Archive.today after alleged DDoS attack
item.description: Wikipedia editors have decided to remove all links to Archive.today, a web archiving service that they said has been linked to more than 695,000 times...

item.title: Sony’s WH-CH720N headphones offer excellent value at full price, but right now they're a steal.
item.description: Sony’s WH-CH720N headphones offer excellent value at full price, but right now they're a steal.
